---
title: "Routes"
format:
  dashboard:
    css: styles.css
    include-after-body: scripts/routes-dashboard.html
---

## Snapshot

### Route Summaries
::: {.desktop-only}
```{=html}
<!--| quarto-html-table-processing: none -->
<table id="itables_3a0802a1_01e7_45be_ba46_59b56813f2d9">
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td style="vertical-align:middle; text-align:left">
        Loading ITables v2.7.3 from the internet...
        (need <a href=https://mwouts.github.io/itables/troubleshooting.html>help</a>?)
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
<link href="https://www.unpkg.com/dt_for_itables@2.5.1/dt_bundle.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script type="module">
    import { ITable, jQuery as $ } from 'https://www.unpkg.com/dt_for_itables@2.5.1/dt_bundle.js';

    document.querySelectorAll("#itables_3a0802a1_01e7_45be_ba46_59b56813f2d9:not(.dataTable)").forEach(table => {
        if (!(table instanceof HTMLTableElement))
            return;

        let dt_args = {
          "classes": ["display", "nowrap", "compact"],
          "columnControl": ["order"],
          "columnDefs": [{"render": "function (data, type, row, meta) { return type === 'sort' || type === 'type' ? data[1] : data[0]; }", "targets": [2, 3, 4]}],
          "data_json": "[[\"<a href=\\\"routes/tg-bbr-loop.html\\\">Trestle Glen to BBR Loop</a>\", \"19th St/Oakland\", [\"19.87\", 19.87], [\"2356.30\", 2356.3], [\"1.52\", 1.52], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/arlington-gravel-loop.html\\\">Arlington Loop <span>(<span style=\\\"color: chocolate;\\\">28% Gravel</span>)</span></a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"14.89\", 14.89], [\"1921.92\", 1921.92], [\"1.18\", 1.18], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop.html\\\">Conlon Trail Loop <span>(<span style=\\\"color: chocolate;\\\">59% Gravel</span>)</span></a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"18.05\", 18.05], [\"2176.84\", 2176.84], [\"1.60\", 1.6], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop.html\\\">Havey Canyon Loop <span>(<span style=\\\"color: chocolate;\\\">55% Gravel</span>)</span></a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"18.83\", 18.83], [\"2072.18\", 2072.18], [\"0.98\", 0.98], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/three-bears-gravel-loop.html\\\">Three Wild Bears <span>(<span style=\\\"color: chocolate;\\\">13% Gravel</span>)</span></a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"32.49\", 32.49], [\"3321.19\", 3321.19], [\"1.41\", 1.41], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop.html\\\">Tunnel to Claremont Loop</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"14.16\", 14.16], [\"1716.54\", 1716.54], [\"1.06\", 1.06], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/wildwood-bbr-loop.html\\\">Wildwood to BBR Loop</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"17.41\", 17.41], [\"2444.23\", 2444.23], [\"1.56\", 1.56], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm.html\\\">Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Joaquin Miller Descent</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"25.09\", 25.09], [\"3424.21\", 3424.21], [\"2.14\", 2.14], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps.html\\\">Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Shepards Canyon Descent</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"27.96\", 27.96], [\"3596.13\", 3596.13], [\"2.47\", 2.47], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/spruce-up-euclid-down.html\\\">Spruce up, Euclid Down</a>\", \"North Berkeley\", [\"11.59\", 11.59], [\"1246.39\", 1246.39], [\"0.53\", 0.53], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/grizzly-peak-loop.html\\\">Grizzly Peak Loop</a>\", \"North Berkeley\", [\"13.91\", 13.91], [\"1747.70\", 1747.7], [\"0.72\", 0.72], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb.html\\\">Richmond to EMB <span>(<span style=\\\"color: forestgreen;\\\">43% Cycleway</span>)</span></a>\", \"Richmond\", [\"29.66\", 29.66], [\"1466.86\", 1466.86], [\"0.87\", 0.87], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop.html\\\">Tunnel to Pinehurst Loop</a>\", \"Rockridge\", [\"22.63\", 22.63], [\"3394.36\", 3394.36], [\"2.40\", 2.4], 0], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart.html\\\">Redwood Road, San Lorenzo to Temescal</a>\", \"San Leandro\", [\"24.55\", 24.55], [\"2958.33\", 2958.33], [\"1.29\", 1.29], 0]]",
          "keys_to_be_evaluated": [["columnDefs", 0, "render"]],
          "layout": {"bottomEnd": "paging", "bottomStart": "info", "topEnd": null, "topStart": "search"},
          "order": [[2, "desc"]],
          "paging": false,
          "scrollCollapse": true,
          "scrollY": "72vh",
          "style": {"width": "100%"},
          "table_html": "<table><thead>\n    <tr style=\"text-align: right;\">\n      \n      <th>Route</th>\n      <th>BART</th>\n      <th>Miles</th>\n      <th>Elevation Gain (ft)</th>\n      <th>Steep Climbing Miles</th>\n      <th>Dangerous Descent Miles</th>\n    </tr>\n  </thead></table>",
          "text_in_header_can_be_selected": true
        };
        new ITable(table, dt_args);
    });
</script>

```
:::

::: {.mobile-only}
```{=html}
<div class="mobile-route-controls">
<div class="mobile-route-control">
<label for="mobile-route-sort">Sort routes</label>
<select id="mobile-route-sort" class="form-select">
<option value="miles_asc">Miles: shortest</option>
<option value="miles_desc">Miles: longest</option>
<option value="elev_asc">Elevation: lowest</option>
<option value="elev_desc">Elevation: highest</option>
</select>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-control">
<label for="mobile-route-bart">BART station</label>
<select id="mobile-route-bart" class="form-select">
<option value="">All stations</option>
<option value="MacArthur">MacArthur</option>
<option value="Rockridge">Rockridge</option>
<option value="San Leandro">San Leandro</option>
<option value="North Berkeley">North Berkeley</option>
<option value="El Cerrito del Norte">El Cerrito del Norte</option>
<option value="Richmond">Richmond</option>
<option value="19th St/Oakland">19th St/Oakland</option>
</select>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-grid" id="mobile-route-grid">
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="11.59" data-elevation="1246.39">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/spruce-up-euclid-down.html">Spruce up, Euclid Down</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/spruce-up-euclid-down/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>11.59</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1246.39 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#91cf60;">83%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="13.91" data-elevation="1747.70">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/grizzly-peak-loop.html">Grizzly Peak Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>13.91</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1747.7 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#1a9850;">85%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="14.16" data-elevation="1716.54">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop.html">Tunnel to Claremont Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>14.16</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1716.54 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#d9ef8b;">55%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="14.89" data-elevation="1921.92">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/arlington-gravel-loop.html">Arlington Loop <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">28% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>14.89</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1921.92 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#91cf60;">83%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="17.41" data-elevation="2444.23">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildwood-bbr-loop.html">Wildwood to BBR Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/wildwood-bbr-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>17.41</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2444.23 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#ffffbf;">51%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.05" data-elevation="2176.84">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop.html">Conlon Trail Loop <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">59% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.05</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2176.84 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#fee08b;">35%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.83" data-elevation="2072.18">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop.html">Havey Canyon Loop <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">55% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.83</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2072.18 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#fee08b;">31%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="19th St/Oakland" data-miles="19.87" data-elevation="2356.30">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/tg-bbr-loop.html">Trestle Glen to BBR Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/tg-bbr-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>19th St/Oakland</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>19.87</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2356.3 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#fee08b;">38%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Rockridge" data-miles="22.63" data-elevation="3394.36">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop.html">Tunnel to Pinehurst Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Rockridge</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>22.63</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3394.36 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#91cf60;">71%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="24.55" data-elevation="2958.33">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart.html">Redwood Road, San Lorenzo to Temescal</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>San Leandro</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>24.55</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2958.33 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#1a9850;">85%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="25.09" data-elevation="3424.21">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm.html">Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Joaquin Miller Descent</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>25.09</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3424.21 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#91cf60;">70%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="27.96" data-elevation="3596.13">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps.html">Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Shepards Canyon Descent</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>27.96</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3596.13 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#d9ef8b;">65%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Richmond" data-miles="29.66" data-elevation="1466.86">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb.html">Richmond to EMB <span>(<span style="color: forestgreen;">43% Cycleway</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Richmond</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>29.66</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1466.86 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#fc8d59;">22%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="32.49" data-elevation="3321.19">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/three-bears-gravel-loop.html">Three Wild Bears <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">13% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>32.49</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3321.19 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#1a9850;">89%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
</div>
```
:::
